'''ây-t-h''' ('''yatahasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:necropsy|necropsy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:necropsy|necropsy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-t-h
|-
! Lemma
| yatahasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yatahithi|yatahithi]] || [[word:yatahiji|yatahiji]] || [[word:yatahishi|yatahishi]] || [[word:yatahi|yatahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatahuthuth|yatahuthuth]] || [[word:yatahujuj|yatahujuj]] || [[word:yatahushush|yatahushush]] || [[word:yatah|yatah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatahuthu|yatahuthu]] || [[word:yatahuju|yatahuju]] || [[word:yatahushu|yatahushu]] || [[word:yatahu|yatahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatahufuth|yatahufuth]] || [[word:yatahufuj|yatahufuj]] || [[word:yatahufush|yatahufush]] || [[word:yatahuf|yatahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yatahethe|yatahethe]] || [[word:yataheje|yataheje]] || [[word:yataheshe|yataheshe]] || [[word:yatahe|yatahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatahothoth|yatahothoth]] || [[word:yatahojoj|yatahojoj]] || [[word:yatahoshosh|yatahoshosh]] || [[word:yatah|yatah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatahotho|yatahotho]] || [[word:yatahojo|yatahojo]] || [[word:yatahosho|yatahosho]] || [[word:yataho|yataho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatahofoth|yatahofoth]] || [[word:yatahofoj|yatahofoj]] || [[word:yatahofosh|yatahofosh]] || [[word:yatahof|yatahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yatahĂŠthĂŠ|yatahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yatahĂŠjĂŠ|yatahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yatahĂŠshĂŠ|yatahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yatahĂŠ|yatahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatahathath|yatahathath]] || [[word:yatahajaj|yatahajaj]] || [[word:yatahashash|yatahashash]] || [[word:yatah|yatah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatahatha|yatahatha]] || [[word:yatahaja|yatahaja]] || [[word:yatahasha|yatahasha]] || [[word:yataha|yataha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatahafath|yatahafath]] || [[word:yatahafaj|yatahafaj]] || [[word:yatahafash|yatahafash]] || [[word:yatahaf|yatahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yatahasha|yatahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyatahasha|goyatahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyatahasha|gokiyatahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yatahnĂŒsha|yatahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyatahnknĂŒsha|goyatahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyatahnĂŒsha|gokiyatahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yatahshĂ«sha|yatahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyatahnkshĂ«sha|goyatahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyatahshĂ«sha|gokiyatahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yatahrosha|yatahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyatahnkrosha|goyatahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyatahrosha|gokiyatahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yatahmusha|yatahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyatahnkmusha|goyatahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatahmusha|gokiyatahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yatahsherasha|yatahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyatahnksherasha|goyatahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyatahsherasha|gokiyatahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yatahngasha|yatahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyatahnkngasha|goyatahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyatahngasha|gokiyatahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yatahyasha|yatahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyatahnkyasha|goyatahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyatahyasha|gokiyatahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yatahyamasha|yatahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyatahnkyamasha|goyatahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyatahyamasha|gokiyatahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yatahnĂŒshĂ«sha|yatahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyatahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyatahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyatahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyatahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yatahnĂŒrosha|yatahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyatahnknĂŒrosha|goyatahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyatahnĂŒrosha|gokiyatahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatahnĂŒmusha|yatahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyatahnknĂŒmusha|goyatahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatahnĂŒmusha|gokiyatahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yatahshĂ«nĂŒsha|yatahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyatahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyatahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyatahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyatahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yatahshĂ«rosha|yatahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyatahnkshĂ«rosha|goyatahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyatahshĂ«rosha|gokiyatahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatahshĂ«musha|yatahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyatahnkshĂ«musha|goyatahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatahshĂ«musha|gokiyatahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yatahronĂŒsha|yatahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyatahnkronĂŒsha|goyatahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyatahronĂŒsha|gokiyatahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yatahroshĂ«sha|yatahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyatahnkroshĂ«sha|goyatahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyatahroshĂ«sha|gokiyatahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatahromusha|yatahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyatahnkromusha|goyatahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatahromusha|gokiyatahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yatahmunĂŒsha|yatahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyatahnkmunĂŒsha|goyatahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyatahmunĂŒsha|gokiyatahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yatahmushĂ«sha|yatahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyatahnkmushĂ«sha|goyatahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyatahmushĂ«sha|gokiyatahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yatahmurosha|yatahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyatahnkmurosha|goyatahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyatahmurosha|gokiyatahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yatah|yatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠh|yĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyatah|hoyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠtĂŠh|hoyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyatah|hohoyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠtĂŠh|hohoyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyatah|nĂŒyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠtĂŠh|nĂŒyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyatah|nĂŒnĂŒyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠtĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyatah|nĂŻyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠtĂŠh|nĂŻyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyatah|nĂŻnĂŻyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠtĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyatah|luyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠtĂŠh|luyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyatah|luluyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠtĂŠh|luluyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyatah|liyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠtĂŠh|liyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyatah|liliyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠtĂŠh|liliyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyatah|koyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠtĂŠh|koyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyatah|kokoyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠtĂŠh|kokoyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyatah|keyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠtĂŠh|keyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyatah|kekeyatah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠtĂŠh|kekeyĂŠtĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
